title: Rich Aerated Malaysian Suet Curry
description: A unique, one-pot dish featuring suet, tempering chocolate, and a mustardy flavor profile. Easy to make and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Suet Crust
ingredients.notes: Chilled and cubed suet for the crust.

ingredients.name: Tempering Chocolate
ingredients.notes: Broken into small pieces for easy melting.

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: Salted and fermented for umami flavor.

ingredients.name: Mustard Seeds
ingredients.notes: Whole and added for a spicy kick.

instructions: In a large, heavy-bottomed saucepan, melt the ghee over medium heat.
Add the tempered chocolate and stir until well combined.
Add the red curry paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Cover the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Add the suet crust pieces and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the mustard seeds and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves and serve hot.
